specName: Unified Journey UI Transformation (One App-Shell Across Every Surface)

scopeProgress.name: One PWA auth model + strengthened capture ACK

knownEnvironmentalFailures.reason: On this macOS-Docker host the smackerel-test-e2e-ui stack bring-up stalls on the 3 GB ollama/ollama image pull (docker compose up -d --wait) and never reaches a browser assertion. This is a stack-bring-up environmental constraint, NOT a browser-green failure, and is not claimed as one.
knownEnvironmentalFailures.acceptedEquivalent: internal/web + internal/api + web/pwa/tests Go render/handler suites cover the browser-level assertions for SCN-100-01/02/03/06/08 (all green).
knownEnvironmentalFailures.routedFinding: F-100-OPT-01 (e2e-ui ollama-weight optimization) routed to bubbles.devops
